overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval village with thatched-roof huts, passing villagers and a child, then exiting through a wooden gate into open countryside and forest trails on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village street with thatched-roof huts

events.description: child runs past Geralt from behind on the village path
dog runs across the path from right to left in front of Geralt
Geralt passes close to a villager sitting on a wooden bench on the left

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the narrow village street between thatched-roof huts, carrying swords on his back

notable_agents.action: child in medieval clothing runs past Geralt along the path
dog runs across the dirt path from right to left side

entered.detail: traditional wooden hut with straw thatched roof and dark timber walls
medieval dwelling with steep thatched roof and wooden structure
rustic wooden post fence lining the village path
simple wooden bench where a villager sits

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow medieval village street lined with traditional thatched-roof huts. A child runs past him from behind, followed by a dog crossing the path. The scene is lit by bright midday sun casting shadows on the dirt trail, with wooden fences and benches visible along the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: village exit with wooden gate structure

events.description: approaching the large wooden gate marking the village exit
Geralt passes through the wooden gate structure leaving the village

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking through the village, following a male villager toward the exit gate

notable_agents.action: male villager in blue shirt walking ahead through the gate

entered.detail: large wooden village gate structure with vertical posts marking the exit
open fields and countryside visible beyond the village gate

segments.scene_description: The village street opens up as Geralt approaches the exit gate. A male villager walks ahead through the wooden gate structure. The thatched huts fall behind as the scene transitions toward the open countryside beyond the village boundaries.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside transitioning to forest trail

events.description: exiting the village completely into open wilderness and grassland
Geralt turns slightly to the left while continuing to walk
entering denser forest area with overhead tree canopy cover

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking alone through open grassland and into the forest, leaving the village behind

entered.detail: open fields with tall golden grass and wildflowers
dense line of trees marking the beginning of the forest
large rock formation visible through the trees on the left
dense overhead cover of tree branches and leaves creating dappled shadows

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the village behind and enters open countryside with tall grass and scattered trees. The path continues into a denser forest area with rocky outcrops visible on the left. The environment shifts from structured village architecture to wild natural wilderness with overhead tree canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the structured confines of a medieval village into the expansive wild of the open countryside. It begins on a narrow dirt street lined with thatched-roof huts, where a child and a dog dart across the path under the bright midday sun. As the camera follows Geralt forward, the village street opens up and the architecture falls away while passing through a wooden exit gate behind a walking villager. The scene then expands into a sun-drenched landscape of tall grass and scattered trees, shifting from the order of the settlement to the raw textures of the wilderness. Finally, the path leads deeper into a dense forest area, where the open sky is replaced by an overhead tree canopy and rocky outcrops emerge along the trail.
